Prithvi Shaw's IPL 2026 U-Turn Shocks Fans

Dec 17, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Prithvi Shaw’s Dramatic IPL 2026 Comeback

Prithvi Shaw experienced a rollercoaster during the IPL 2026 auction, initially going unsold twice before Delhi Capitals made a late bid at his base price, reigniting his career prospects. The episode underscored the unpredictability of the auction and the high-stakes pressure modern players face.
